description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of a designated renewable machine related model at a specified renewable machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_wnmod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_wnmod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Renewable machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a renewable machine model.
no <model type> model at this machine.
the <model type> model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input VARs used in model NAME.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
machine is not designated as a renewable machine in power flow.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
